description:
I found a restaurant in Aomori prefecture that offers delicious sashimi.
The restaurant is Fukuro.
I will introduce Fukuro with a video.

Then, I will introduce a video of the inside of the Smile Hotel single room, which can be reached within about 5-minute walk from Aomori Station.

Have a nice trip !!
==
青森県青森駅から徒歩約5分程度にある居酒屋「ふく郎」を紹介します。
刺身が抜群にうまい！
動画に映っているのは、一人前の量になってます。
たしか、、価格は1000円前後でした。

それと、前回の動画でもお伝えしている、スマイルホテルに泊まったので、シングルルームの部屋紹介動画です。

▼Please subscribe !!▼
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCNcauZQ4yo19ZF4p_7_GYhw?sub_confirmation=1

▼SNS▼
On Twitter, I post a lot of photos taken during trips other than videos.
Twitter：https://twitter.com/hamalab8

■notice
This video is for people who want to go to Japan but are sick or physically handicapped, or those who want to go to Japan but cannot travel due to lack of funds, to enjoy the feeling of traveling as much as possible. 

So it's a video that makes you feel like you're actually walking.

I hope you feel like you are in Japan with this video.


===
This channel is a program that introduces the greatness of Japan. 
I have traveled to 39 countries around the world.

#aboutJapan #aomori #hotel
